title: pseudognaphalium ephemerum
intro: Pseudognaphalium ephemerum, also known as Desert Pearly Everlasting, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, known for its delicate white or yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. Pseudognaphalium ephemerum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including colds, sore throats, and digestive problems.
